{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842574398105535208
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom pydantic import Field\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=REDACTED\".env\", env_prefix=REDACTED\"MINIQ_\", extra=REDACTED\"ignore\")\n\n    service_name: str = \"miniq\"\n    api_host: str = \"0.0.0.0\"\n    api_port: int = 8000\n    worker_metrics_port: int = 9101\n    scheduler_metrics_port: int = 9102\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://redis:6379/0\"\n    redis_group: str = \"workers\"\n    default_queue: str = \"default\"\n    worker_queues: str = \"default\"\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\n    worker_poll_block_ms: int = 1000\n    worker_visibility_timeout_ms: int = 10_000\n    worker_reclaim_interval_seconds: float = 2.0\n    scheduler_interval_seconds: float = 1.0\n    scheduler_config_path: Path = Path(\"config/schedules.yaml\")\n    db_path: Path = Path(\"/data/miniq.db\")\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n    retry_base_delay_seconds: float = 1.0\n    retry_multiplier: float = 2.0\n    retry_cap_seconds: float = 30.0\n    retry_jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n    health_timeout_seconds: float = 2.0\n    http_timeout_seconds: float = 5.0\n    api_base_url: str = Field(\"http://localhost:8000\", description=REDACTED\"Used by the CLI.\")\n    scheduler_batch_size: int = 128\n    broker_read_count: int = 8\n\n    @property\n    def database_url(self) -> str:\n        return f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{self.db_path.as_posix()}\"\n\n    @property\n    def queue_names(self) -> list[str]:\n        items = [item.strip() for item in self.worker_queues.split(\",\")]\n        return [item for item in items if item]\n\n\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=REDACTED RetryPolicy:\n    base_delay_seconds: float\n    multiplier: float\n    cap_seconds: float\n    jitter_ratio: float\n\n\ndef calculate_retry_delay(*, job_id: str, attempt: int, policy: RetryPolicy) -> float:\n    if attempt < 1:\n        msg = \"attempt must be >= 1\"\n        raise ValueError(msg)\n    base_delay = min(\n        policy.cap_seconds, policy.base_delay_seconds * (policy.multiplier ** (attempt - 1))\n    )\n    digest = hashlib.sha256(f\"{job_id}:{attempt}\".encode()).hexdigest()\n    fraction = int(digest[:8], 16) / 0xFFFFFFFF\n    min_factor = 1.0 - policy.jitter_ratio\n    max_factor = 1.0 + policy.jitter_ratio\n    factor = min_factor + ((max_factor - min_factor) * fraction)\n    delay = base_delay * factor\n    return min(policy.cap_seconds, max(0.0, delay))\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom enum import StrEnum\n\n\nclass JobState(StrEnum):\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\n\n\nTERMINAL_STATES = {\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n    JobState.FAILED,\n    JobState.CANCELED,\n    JobState.DEAD,\n}\n\nACTIVE_STATES = {\n    JobState.QUEUED,\n    JobState.RUNNING,\n}\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\n\n\ndef is_transition_allowed(old_state: JobState, new_state: JobState) -> bool:\n    return new_state in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS[old_state]\n\n\ndef require_transition(old_state: JobState, new_state: JobState) -> None:\n    if not is_transition_allowed(old_state, new_state):\n        msg = f\"invalid job state transition: {old_state} -> {new_state}\"\n        raise ValueError(msg)\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}

253D%2BPath%2528%255C%2522%252Fdata%252Fminiq.db%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blog_level%253A%2Bstr%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522INFO%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bretry_base_delay_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B1.0%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bretry_multiplier%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B2.0%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bretry_cap_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B30.0%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bretry_jitter_ratio%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B0.2%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhealth_timeout_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B2.0%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp_timeout_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2B5.0%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bapi_base_url%253A%2Bstr%2B%253D%2BField%2528%255C%2522http%253A%252F%252Flocalhost%253A8000%255C%2522%252C%2Bdescription%253DREDACTED%2522Used%2Bby%2Bthe%2BCLI.%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bscheduler_batch_size%253A%2Bint%2B%253D%2B128%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbroker_read_count%253A%2Bint%2B%253D%2B8%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2540property%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bdatabase_url%2528self%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bstr%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bf%255C%2522sqlite%2Baiosqlite%253A%252F%252F%252F%257Bself.db_path.as_posix%2528%2529%257D%255C%2522%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2540property%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bqueue_names%2528self%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Blist%255Bstr%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bitems%2B%253D%2B%255Bitem.strip%2528%2529%2Bfor%2Bitem%2Bin%2Bself.worker_queues.split%2528%255C%2522%252C%255C%2522%2529%255D%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2B%255Bitem%2Bfor%2Bitem%2Bin%2Bitems%2Bif%2Bitem%255D%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bget_settings%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BSettings%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2BSettings%2528%2529%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnimport%2Bhashlib%255Cnfrom%2Bdataclasses%2Bimport%2Bdataclass%255Cn%255Cn%255Cn%2540dataclass%2528frozen%253DTrue%252C%2Bslots%253DREDACTED%2BRetryPolicy%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase_delay_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmultiplier%253A%2Bfloat%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bcap_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bjitter_ratio%253A%2Bfloat%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bcalculate_retry_delay%2528%252A%252C%2Bjob_id%253A%2Bstr%252C%2Battempt%253A%2Bint%252C%2Bpolicy%253A%2BRetryPolicy%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bfloat%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Battempt%2B%255Cu003c%2B1%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bmsg%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522attempt%2Bmust%2Bbe%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B1%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%2BValueError%2528msg%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase_delay%2B%253D%2Bmin%2528%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpolicy.cap_seconds%252C%2Bpolicy.base_delay_seconds%2B%252A%2B%2528policy.multiplier%2B%252A%252A%2B%2528attempt%2B-%2B1%2529%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdigest%2B%253D%2Bhashlib.sha256%2528f%255C%2522%257Bjob_id%257D%253A%257Battempt%257D%255C%2522.encode%2528%2529%2529.hexdigest%2528%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfraction%2B%253D%2Bint%2528digest%255B%253A8%255D%252C%2B16%2529%2B%252F%2B0xFFFFFFFF%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmin_factor%2B%253D%2B1.0%2B-%2Bpolicy.jitter_ratio%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_factor%2B%253D%2B1.0%2B%2B%2Bpolicy.jitter_ratio%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfactor%2B%253D%2Bmin_factor%2B%2B%2B%2528%2528max_factor%2B-%2Bmin_factor%2529%2B%252A%2Bfraction%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdelay%2B%253D%2Bbase_delay%2B%252A%2Bfactor%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bmin%2528policy.cap_seconds%252C%2Bmax%25280.0%252C%2Bdelay%2529%2529%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Benum%2Bimport%2BStrEnum%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BJobState%2528StrEnum%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BQUEUED%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522QUEUED%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BRUNNING%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522RUNNING%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BSUCCEEDED%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522SUCCEEDED%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BFAILED%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522FAILED%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BCANCELED%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522CANCELED%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BDEAD%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522DEAD%255C%2522%255Cn%255Cn%255CnTERMINAL_STATES%2B%253D%2B%257B%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.SUCCEEDED%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.FAILED%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.CANCELED%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.DEAD%252C%255Cn%257D%255Cn%255CnACTIVE_STATES%2B%253D%2B%257B%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.QUEUED%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BJobState.RUNNING%252C%255Cn%257D%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.db.models%2Bimport%2BALLOWED_TRANSITIONS%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.enums%2Bimport%2BJobState%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bis_transition_allowed%2528old_state%253A%2BJobState%252C%2Bnew_state%253A%2BJobState%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bbool%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bnew_state%2Bin%2BALLOWED_TRANSITIONS%255Bold_state%255D%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Brequire_transition%2528old_state%253A%2BJobState%252C%2Bnew_state%253A%2BJobState%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bnot%2Bis_transition_allowed%2528old_state%252C%2Bnew_state%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bmsg%2B%253D%2Bf%255C%2522invalid%2Bjob%2Bstate%2Btransition%253A%2B%257Bold_state%257D%2B-%255Cu003e%2B%257Bnew_state%257D%255C%2522%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%2BValueError%2528msg%2529%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%255D%257D
